toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"powershell -Command \"Get-Content C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\brain\\e2ce67ec-d36e-4d6a-b7d1-a7103081bfc8\\.system_generated\\logs\\transcript.jsonl | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '\\\"step_index\\\":(\\d+)') { `$step = [int]`$Matches[1]; if (`$step -ge 1300 -and `$step -le 1335) { `$obj = ConvertFrom-Json `$_; if (`$obj.tool_calls) { Write-Output ('Step: ' + `$step + ' Tool: ' + `$obj.tool_calls[0].name) } } } }\"","Cwd":"C:\\Users\\DELL\\.gemini\\antigravity\\scratch\\master-construction-portal","WaitMsBeforeAsync":5000,"toolAction":"Extracting tool calls","toolSummary":"Extract tool calls cleanly from transcript.jsonl"}
